nhAssessmentDemographicLink: Links demographic field display to an assessment link configuration with ordering. Related to nhAssessmentCarePlanLink.
nhAssessmentGoalLink: Links goal records to assessment link configurations with display options. Related to nhAssessmentCarePlanLink.
nhAssessmentGroups: Defines named groups for organising NH assessments per company/location/area. Referenced by nhAssessments.
nhAssessments: Defines NH assessment templates with group, archive, and version tracking support. Referenced by nhAssessmentTaken and nhaQuestions.
nhAssessmentTaken: Records completed NH assessment instances for clients, with open/close timestamps and review date. Related to nhAssessments and client.
nhaTakenAnswers: Stores individual answers submitted for an NH assessment instance, supporting both option and text responses. Related to nhAssessmentTaken and nhaQuestions.
nhaTakenAnswersLOCKED: Archives locked/finalised NH assessment answers when an assessment is closed or superseded. Related to nhAssessmentTaken.
nhaTemplateAssessment: Links assessments to assessment templates. Related to nhaTemplates and nhAssessments.
nhaTemplateFolder: Links folder structures to assessment templates. Related to nhaTemplates.
nhaTemplates: Defines named NH assessment template collections per company/location. Referenced by nhaTemplateAssessment and nhaTemplateFolder.
nhbmiCategories: Defines BMI classification categories with colour, score, and upper value thresholds. Referenced by MUST assessment calculations.
nhCarePlanCalls: Records AI voice call sessions made to carers about care plans for specific residents, storing questions and call IDs. Related to carer and client.
nhCarePlanCallsMultiplePlans: Links multiple care plan IDs to a single AI care plan call record. Related to nhCarePlanCalls.
nhCarePlanSignatures: Stores digital signatures captured during care plan sign-off for clients, linked to a contact type and care plan instance. Related to client.
nhCarePlanUpdates: Records content updates to specific sections of an NH care plan instance, with colour coding. Related to client and nhaCarePlanTaken.
nhDefaultAssessmentPrepopSentences: Stores default pre-populated sentence suggestions for assessment question-answer combinations. Related to nhDefaultAssessments.
nhDefaultAssessmentQuestionAnswers: Defines answer options for default NH assessment questions. Related to nhDefaultAssessmentQuestions.
nhDefaultAssessmentQuestions: Defines questions for default NH assessments, organised by section with type and ordering. Related to nhDefaultAssessments.
nhDefaultAssessments: Defines system-level default NH assessment templates with group and version tracking. Referenced by nhDefaultAssessmentQuestions.
nhDefaultChartQuestionAnswers: Defines answer options for default NH chart questions. Related to nhDefaultChartQuestions.
nhDefaultChartQuestions: Defines questions within default NH chart templates with type and ordering. Related to nhDefaultCharts.
nhDefaultCharts: Defines system-level default NH chart templates with archive and version tracking. Referenced by nhDefaultChartQuestions.
nhDiagnosis: Records clinical diagnoses for clients with type, details, and date of diagnosis. Related to client, carer, company, and location.
nhEntryTypeSetup: Configures which charts, assessments, and care plans are associated with specific client statuses per area. Related to company and location.
nhFlagCategory: Defines named flag categories with colour coding and sub-category support per area. Referenced by nhFlags.
nhFlags: Defines named clinical or care flags with category and sub-category classification per area. Referenced by assessment and care plan answer flows.
nhFollowUps: Records follow-up actions linked to chart questions or categories for clients. Related to client.
nhFormQuestions: Defines questions within NH forms with type (options, text, date, time, checkbox), group, and ordering. Related to nhForms and nhFormQuestionsGroups.
nhFormQuestionsGroups: Defines named section groups within NH forms for organising questions. Related to nhForms and nhFormQuestions.
nhFormQuestionsOptions: Defines selectable answer options for NH form questions. Related to nhFormQuestions.
nhForms: Defines NH clinical form templates with movement and review period configuration. Referenced by nhFormQuestions and nhAnswers.
nhFormScore: Defines score range bands with result text and colour for NH forms. Related to nhForms.
nhGoals: Records clinical goals for clients with planned action, review date, category, status, and outcome. Related to client.
nhGoalsCategory: Lookup table of named goal categories per company/location. Referenced by nhGoals.
nhGoalsStatus: Lookup table of named goal status values per company/location. Referenced by nhGoals.
nhHandoverNotes: Records handover notes linked to chart questions or categories for clients, with seen tracking. Related to client.
nhMedicalHistory: Records historical medical procedures for clients with date and further details. Related to client, company, and location.
nhMessages: Stores internal messages between staff members and residents, with priority, read tracking, and reply threading. Related to company and location.
nhmustAssessment: Records MUST (Malnutrition Universal Screening Tool) assessment data for clients, including weight, height, BMI, and scoring. Related to client and carer.
nhNotificationCategory: Lookup table of notification category types for NH notifications per area. Referenced by nhNotifications.
nhNotifications: Stores system notifications for staff related to client events, linked to categories and optional records. Related to client and carer.
nhPhotoGalleryCategories: Defines named categories for the NH photo gallery. Referenced by nhPhotoGalleryItems.
nhPhotoGalleryItems: Stores photo gallery entries for clients with category, title, description, and thumbnail references. Related to client and nhPhotoGalleryCategories.
nhPin: Stores area-level PIN codes used for restricted access within NH workflows. Related to area.
nhProfileSections: Defines named sections within the NH client profile with ordering and folder assignment. Related to area.
nhProgressNotes: Records clinical progress notes for clients with category, reason, priority, status, and completion date. Related to client, nhProgressNotesCategory, nhProgressNotesReason, area, company, and location.
nhProgressNotesCategory: Defines named categories for progress notes per area. Referenced by nhProgressNotes and nhProgressNotesTasks.
nhProgressNotesReason: Defines named reasons within progress note categories, with optional email notification configuration. Related to nhProgressNotesCategory.
nhProgressNotesSubtasks: Records subtask instances assigned to carers within a progress note, with due date, status, priority, and file upload. Related to nhProgressNotes and nhProgressNotesTasks.
nhProgressNotesSubtasksActions: Defines action rules for progress note subtasks including mandatory flags, completion days, and notification times. Related to nhProgressNotesSubtasks.
nhProgressNotesTaskActions: Defines action templates for progress note tasks, including chart schedule and directive permissions. Related to nhProgressNotesTasks.
nhProgressNotesTasks: Defines named task templates associated with progress note reason and category combinations, with completion and notification config. Related to nhProgressNotesCategory and nhProgressNotesReason.
nhQuickNotes: Stores quick/shorthand notes for clients or carers by category within a ward/area. Related to client and carer.
nhQuickNotesCategories: Lookup table of quick note categories per company/location. Referenced by nhQuickNotes.
nhReviewDates: Tracks review dates for any clinical item type (assessment, care plan, chart) linked to a client. Related to client.
nhReviewItemTypes: Lookup table of item types that can have review dates tracked. Referenced by nhReviewDates.
nhReviewReasons: Lookup table of named reasons for scheduling a clinical review per area. Referenced by review workflows.
nhSign: Stores signature file paths for NH-related sign-off events per area. Related to area.
nhs_medicine_list: Stores the NHS medication list with names, URLs, and detailed clinical information. Referenced by medicationList.
nhTabletLogin: Stores tablet device login credentials and activation state for ward-based tablet access. Related to area.
notifications: Stores general system notifications for carers or clients, shown in the menu. Related to client and carer.
notificationsAdmin: Stores admin-level notifications linked to specific carers and system areas with permission flags. Related to carer.
notifications_PO: Stores personal outcome access notifications for clients or carers, with seen tracking and reason for access. Related to client and carer.
old_holidayCalculations: Legacy copy of holiday calculation summaries per carer. Superseded by holidayCalculations.
OLD_holidays: Legacy copy of holiday records before structural changes. Related to carer.
othFunctions: Documents internal PHP/JS functions with categories, parameters, examples, and links for developer reference. Standalone documentation table.
outcome: Defines named outcome records for clinical or care events, with details and original ID for version tracking. Referenced by outcomeClientLink and outcomeTaskLink.
outcomeClientLink: Links outcomes to specific clients with event assignment flags. Related to client and outcome.
outcomeSectionPRSB: Stores PRSB-format care plan outcome entries for clients linked to needs and care plan instances. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
outcomeTaskLink: Links outcomes to daily tasks or medications for specific clients. Related to outcome, client, cmdailyTasks, and medicationList.
OverlapBlockshifts: Records overlapping block shift and timesheet pairs for conflict tracking. Related to carer.
package: Defines care funding package records for clients with budget, management fee, and date range. Related to client.
packageBalanceHistory: Tracks historical package budget balance snapshots per client and category from authority systems. Related to client and package.
packageBreakdown: Defines budget breakdown allocations within a care package by category and approval level. Related to package and client.
packageFees: Stores daily care management and plan management fee rates over effective date ranges. Related to company and location.
packageOpeningBalance: Records opening balance values for care packages at the start of a period. Related to package and client.
packageSubsidies: Stores Australian government HCP and supplement subsidy daily rates over effective date ranges. Related to company and location.
pageAccess: Controls which specific pages individual carers can access. Related to carer.
pagesInfo: Stores help content and video links for specific system pages. Standalone documentation table.
participationEvent: Records participation/activity events for clients linked to a named participation activity. Related to client and carer.
participationEventFilePivot: Links file uploads to participation event records. Related to participationEvent and fileUpload.
participationEventThemePivot: Links theme tags to participation event records. Related to participationEvent and participationThemes.
participationKeyTbl: Links keywords to participation activities. Related to participationNames and participationKeywords.
participationKeywords: Defines named keywords for tagging participation activities. Referenced by participationKeyTbl.
participationNames: Defines named participation/activity types per company/location. Referenced by participationEvent.
participationThemes: Defines named theme labels for participation activities. Referenced by participationThemeTbl.
participationThemeTbl: Links themes to specific participation activities. Related to participationNames and participationThemes.
PASScarers: Maps carers to their PASS integration external IDs. Related to carer.
PASSclients: Maps clients to their PASS integration external IDs. Related to client.
PASSschedules: Maps scheduled visit records to their PASS integration IDs. Related to carer and client.
passwordRequirements: Stores password complexity and expiry configuration for carers and admins per company. Standalone config table.
password_reset_tokens: Stores password reset tokens issued to users by email. Standalone authentication table.
pastScheduleEvent: Logs past schedule events that have been actioned per carer. Related to carer.
pausedScheduled: Records paused recurring schedule instances with reason, covering carer, and original schedule details. Related to carer and client.
payRollSettings: Stores payroll visibility date range and travel deduction configuration per company/location. Related to company and location.
payScaleUpdates: Logs pay scale component updates including bank holiday and weekend rate flags. Related to company and location.
permission: Defines admin permission level types with names, landing pages, and descriptions. Referenced by carer.
permissionCategories: Defines named categories for grouping permission list items with colour and type. Referenced by permissionList.
permissionDefaultTemplate: Maps a default permission template to a specific home/location. Related to company and location.
permissionList: Defines individual permission actions with category, type, input type, and active status. Related to permissionCategories.
